\tzpentry{ID3307}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3307 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Phi_ \text{ac}(r, \theta, \phi,t) = \sum_{nlm} A_{nlm} \, j_n(k_{nl}r) \, Y_l^m( \theta, \phi) \, e^{-i \omega_{nl}t} \end{equation}
